pain_points: KYC document reviewers spend 4 hours per customer onboarding — most of it reading the same document types
Compliance reports for regulators take 3 days to compile and are done entirely in Excel
context: Met with founder and Head of Compliance. They already use AWS Textract for basic OCR but extract nothing from the results — raw text goes into MongoDB unstructured. No analytics. The compliance report problem is urgent: they have a regulator audit in 6 months and the current Excel process will not scale to their 3 new clients. They have never evaluated an AI vendor and have no ML budget, but the founder is technical and willing to prototype.
